name: Clorless, Chaos King of Dark World
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>混</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>沌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> カラレス
name_jp_tl: Cololess<!-- do not change this, Dark World monsters always have been deliberately misspelled and this one was no different despite the dub name -->, Chaos King of Dark World
desc:
"Reign-Beaux, Overlord of Dark World" + 2+ Fiend monsters
If this card is Fusion Summoned: You can destroy all cards your opponent controls. This card's original ATK/DEF each become the number of materials used for its Summon x 1000. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up card you control; discard 1 card, also your opponent cannot target that face-up card with card effects for the rest of this turn.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
